summary: probe assertions were failable and passed

assertions.behavior: the live adapter targets Deepgram Nova-3 streaming WebSocket with interim results, endpointing, and streaming diarization
Deepgram is_final is normalized to boolean isFinal and final frames remain under the word-final latency budget
assertions.error: Deepgram result is missing boolean is_final.

assertions.behavior: Deepgram diarization words are exposed as speaker_0 and speaker_1 labels on transcript observations
assertions.error:
expect(received).toMatch(expected)

Expected substring or pattern: /^speaker_[01]$/u
Received: "speaker-0"

assertions.behavior: silence produces no TranscriptObservation rather than an empty observation
a two-speaker overlap frame is split into observations for both diarized speakers
record-replay over transcript observations produces deterministic decisionIds without a live socket
live Deepgram Nova-3 validation is reported as blocked/skipped without DEEPGRAM_API_KEY and runs through the real adapter when present
assertions.error:
expect(received).toBeNull()

Received: "live Deepgram validation SKIPPED - requires DEEPGRAM_API_KEY"

assertions.behavior: probe artifacts contain no key-shaped strings
the live adapter targets Deepgram Nova-3 streaming WebSocket with interim results, endpointing, and streaming diarization
Deepgram is_final is normalized to boolean isFinal and final frames remain under the word-final latency budget
Deepgram diarization words are exposed as speaker_0 and speaker_1 labels on transcript observations
silence produces no TranscriptObservation rather than an empty observation
a two-speaker overlap frame is split into observations for both diarized speakers
record-replay over transcript observations produces deterministic decisionIds without a live socket
live Deepgram Nova-3 validation is reported as blocked/skipped without DEEPGRAM_API_KEY and runs through the real adapter when present
probe artifacts contain no key-shaped strings

liveDeepgram.reason: live Deepgram gate did not run because DEEPGRAM_API_KEY is absent

meta.fallback: If Deepgram diarization is unavailable, the observation layer remains redesignable without speaker labels by deriving turn boundaries from energy/VAD and emitting TranscriptObservation.speaker as null.
